description: Evaluation cases for computational model peer review readiness skill

evals.prompt: Peer review my computational model repository for CoMSES readiness and give a final decision.
evals.expected_output: Structured report with binary pass/fail

evals.prompt: Can you review the scientific novelty of my model and decide if the theory is correct?
evals.expected_output: Scopes review to software/documentation; excludes scientific validity

evals.prompt: Review this model package. Tests are missing and CI is not configured, but it runs and has strong docs and clean code.
evals.expected_output: Flags tests/CI as major but not required criteria blockers

evals.prompt: Assess my model documentation. I use a framework equivalent to ODD, not ODD itself.
evals.expected_output: Evaluates coverage equivalence, not format

evals.prompt: I have ODD docs. Use the peer-review process to assess whether the documentation passes quality checks.
evals.expected_output: References ODD evaluation and document skill

evals.prompt: Write a Python script to parse CSV files into JSON.
evals.expected_output: Does not activate

evals.prompt: Create a conference abstract about my simulation findings.
evals.expected_output: Does not activate

evals.prompt: Run a peer-review readiness assessment and explicitly anchor your findings to the local compressed CoMSES and EVERSE rubric snapshots.
evals.expected_output: Review referencing rubric assets

evals.prompt: Is my computational model repository ready for publication?
evals.expected_output: Triggers full readiness review

evals.prompt: Re-evaluate my model after I fixed documentation issues and added tests.
evals.expected_output: Updated review reflecting improvements

evals.prompt: Validate whether my model meets CoMSES submission criteria
evals.expected_output: Checklist-based validation report

evals.prompt: Generate a FAIR metadata record for my model
evals.expected_output: Does not activate; FAIR skill domain

evals.prompt: Write documentation for my simulation model
evals.expected_output: Does not activate; document skill domain

evals.prompt: Explain what peer review is
evals.expected_output: Informational only

evals.prompt: Check if my repository is good
evals.expected_output: Clarifies scope and performs structured review

evals.prompt: Review my code for performance optimizations
evals.expected_output: Does not activate; performance tuning is out of scope

evals.prompt: Evaluate my model and generate a Slurm script to run it
evals.expected_output: Performs review only; does not generate HPC artifacts

evals.prompt: Fix grammar issues in my model documentation
evals.expected_output: Does not activate; editing task

evals.prompt: My repository runs but has no documentation or instructions. Is it acceptable?
evals.expected_output: Fails due to missing required documentation criteria

evals.prompt: Assess whether my repository meets FAIR principles and CoMSES review criteria
evals.expected_output: Focuses on CoMSES review; may reference FAIR but does not replace FAIR skill

evals.prompt: Give me a quick yes/no if my model is good enough
evals.expected_output: Produces full structured review before binary decision
